title: Bit Digital Finalises GPU Supply Contract with Boosteroid
text: Bit Digital has finalized its GPU supply contract with Boosteroid, the third-largest cloud gaming provider globally. The Master Service Agreement (MSA) with Boosteroid represents a major milestone for Bit Digital's HPC business expansion. The initial deployment involves GPU servers that are expected to generate significant recurring revenue over a multi-year period. Boosteroid is positioned as a major customer for Bit Digital's high-performance computing infrastructure, with the potential to expand deployment significantly through options embedded in the agreement. The contract demonstrates growing demand for GPU-based cloud services in the cloud gaming vertical, a key market segment for HPC infrastructure providers. This partnership aligns with Bit Digital's strategic focus on scaling HPC services as the company transitions away from traditional Bitcoin mining. The finalization of the MSA with Boosteroid validates the market opportunity for Bit Digital's HPC offerings and demonstrates the company's ability to secure enterprise-grade customers in new verticals.
